name: Synodon Inc.
summary: Synodon Inc. operates as a remote sensing technology company in North America. It offers realSens, a proprietary remote gas sensing instrument that detects ground level hydrocarbon gas occurrences from an aircraft and detects gasses evaporating off of liquid hydrocarbons. The company also provides airborne pipeline integrity management services, such as liquid leak detection, pipeline threat assessment, right-of-way change and slope analysis, tree canopy encroachment, water crossings analysis, and pipeline location classification services. It serves oil and gas pipeline operators. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Edmonton, Canada.
